meaning: n.伦敦的上流住宅区,伦敦的社交界
examples: The business employed 25 people in London's Mayfair.
The East India Company, which once ruled India, has recently been reborn as a posh Mayfair shop.
The duke inherited one of the most valuable portfolios of property holdings on Earth, centred on Mayfair in London.
Is a Russian in Mayfair on a par with a Pakistani in the Midlands?
Chor Bizarre, an Indian restaurant in New Delhi, has opened a branch in London's Mayfair.
